PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?editionLabel WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q1032264 ; p:P1346 ?winStatement .
  ?winStatement ps:P1346 ?winner ; pq:P2094 wd:Q28105765 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
    .
  }
  ?edition rdfs:label ?editionLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?editionLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
